positive: A whimsical and stylized forest scene featuring abstract silhouettes of woodland animals (deer, foxes, badgers) interwoven with stylized flora and celestial elements (crescent moons, twinkling stars, abstract leaves). The composition must be centrally balanced, creating a strong, cohesive pattern suitable for seamless apparel printing. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, sage green, and burnt orange against an off-white background. The style should resemble intricate negative space woodcut engraving or sophisticated linocut illustration, focusing on clean lines, sharp contrasts, and bold, repeatable shapes. Highly detailed, vector art aesthetic, centered, ethereal, mystical forest garden.
negative: blur, artifact, low resolution, grain, sketch, pencil lines, watercolor, text, watermark, logo, signature, human face, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grayscale, jpeg artifacts, messy, solid background color
